fields.description:
OCPP 1.6 Certification Test Execution

Generated: 2026-05-30T02:13:25.677Z
Total Tests: 113

Suites covered:
  - MAINTENANCE (6 tests)
  - ColdBoot (2 tests)
  - StartSession (3 tests)
  - StopSession (5 tests)
  - Cache (4 tests)
  - RemoteActions (4 tests)
  - Resetting (4 tests)
  - Unlocking (4 tests)
  - Configuration (2 tests)
  - MeterValues (2 tests)
  - BasicActions (3 tests)
  - RemoteActionsNonHappy (3 tests)
  - UnlockingNonHappy (2 tests)
  - PowerFailure (3 tests)
  - OfflineBehavior (6 tests)
  - ConfigKeysNonHappy (2 tests)
  - FaultBehavior (1 tests)
  - LocalAuthList (8 tests)
  - FirmwareManagement (3 tests)
  - Diagnostics (2 tests)
  - Reservation (16 tests)
  - RemoteTrigger (2 tests)
  - SmartCharging (10 tests)
  - DataTransfer (1 tests)
  - Security (15 tests)

Cold Boot Charge Point

Suite: ColdBoot
No CDS required — protocol-only test. Reboot test — requires extended timeouts (max_timeout_period=600, long_operation_timeout=650).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 7

steps.action: Power on / restart the Charge Point
steps.result: SUT powers on and establishes WebSocket connection to CSMS

steps.action: SUT sends BootNotification to register with the Central System
CSMS rejects the first boot with a wait time
steps.result: SUT receives Rejected status with waitTime=60s

steps.action: SUT waits for the specified wait time
SUT retries BootNotification after wait time expires
CSMS accepts the boot and SUT registration completes
steps.result: Boot accepted; SUT receives current time and heartbeat interval

steps.action: SUT reports status for each connector

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_002_CS — Cold Boot Charge Point - Pending
fields.description:
Cold Boot Charge Point - Pending

Suite: ColdBoot
No CDS required — protocol-only test. Reboot test — requires extended timeouts (max_timeout_period=600, long_operation_timeout=650).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 7

steps.action: Power on / restart the Charge Point
steps.result: SUT powers on and establishes WebSocket connection to CSMS

steps.action: SUT sends BootNotification
CSMS rejects with long wait time to keep SUT in pending state
steps.result: SUT enters pending state with waitTime=3600s

steps.action: CSMS sends GetConfiguration while SUT is in pending state
steps.result: SUT responds despite being in pending state

steps.action: SUT responds to configuration request
steps.result: SUT returns configuration values while pending

steps.action: CSMS sends ChangeConfiguration while SUT is in pending state
steps.result: SUT accepts configuration change while pending

steps.action: SUT responds to configuration change
steps.result: SUT accepts ChangeConfiguration in pending state

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_003_CS — Regular Charging Session - Plugin First
fields.description:
Regular Charging Session - Plugin First

Suite: StartSession
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 10

steps.action: Ensure SUT is registered and connectors are Available
steps.result: SUT is ready for charging session

steps.action: EV driver plugs cable into the connector
SUT detects plug event and updates connector status
EV driver presents RFID/IdTag for authorization
SUT sends Authorize request to CSMS
steps.result: Authorize request sent with the presented IdTag

steps.action: CSMS authorizes the IdTag
SUT locks the connector (if applicable) and starts transaction
steps.result: StartTransaction request sent with initial meter value

steps.action: CSMS accepts the transaction
SUT updates connector status to Charging
Energy transfer begins (EV simulated charging)

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_004_1_CS — Regular Charging Session - Identification First
fields.description:
Regular Charging Session - Identification First

Suite: StartSession
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 9

steps.action: Ensure SUT is registered and connectors are Available
EV driver presents RFID/IdTag for authorization first (before plugging)
SUT sends Authorize request
CSMS authorizes the IdTag
EV driver plugs cable into the connector
SUT detects plug event and updates status
SUT locks connector and starts transaction
CSMS accepts the transaction
SUT updates connector status to Charging

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_004_2_CS — Regular Charging Session - Identification First - ConnectionTimeOut
fields.description:
Regular Charging Session - Identification First - ConnectionTimeOut

Suite: StartSession
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: EV driver presents IdTag (identification first)
SUT sends Authorize
CSMS authorizes the IdTag
EV driver does NOT plug the cable within ConnectionTimeOut period
SUT aborts the pending session and returns connector to Available
steps.result: Connector returns to Available after timeout

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_005_1_CS — EV Side Disconnected - StopTxnOnEVSideDisconnect=true - UnlockConnectorOnEVSideDisconnect=true
fields.description:
EV Side Disconnected - StopTxnOnEVSideDisconnect=true - UnlockConnectorOnEVSideDisconnect=true

Suite: StopSession
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: Start a regular charging session (transaction active)
EV driver disconnects the cable from the EV side
SUT detects EV disconnection and stops the transaction
CSMS confirms the stop
SUT unlocks the connector (UnlockConnectorOnEVSideDisconnect=true)
SUT updates connector status

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_005_2_CS — EV Side Disconnected - StopTxnOnEVSideDisconnect=true - UnlockConnectorOnEVSideDisconnect=false
fields.description:
EV Side Disconnected - StopTxnOnEVSideDisconnect=true - UnlockConnectorOnEVSideDisconnect=false

Suite: StopSession
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: Start a regular charging session (transaction active)
EV driver disconnects the cable from the EV side
SUT detects EV disconnection and stops the transaction
CSMS confirms the stop
SUT does NOT unlock the connector (UnlockConnectorOnEVSideDisconnect=false)
SUT updates connector status

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_005_3_CS — EV Side Disconnected - StopTxnOnEVSideDisconnect=false - UnlockConnectorOnEVSideDisconnect=false
fields.description:
EV Side Disconnected - StopTxnOnEVSideDisconnect=false - UnlockConnectorOnEVSideDisconnect=false

Suite: StopSession
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: Start a regular charging session (transaction active)
EV driver disconnects the cable from the EV side
SUT detects EV disconnection but does NOT stop transaction
steps.result: Transaction continues; status set to SuspendedEV

steps.action: SUT keeps connector locked (no unlock)
steps.result: Connector remains locked, transaction still active

fields.description:
Regular Start - Cached Id

Suite: Cache
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: Perform a successful charging session to populate the authorization cache
steps.result: IdTag is now cached on SUT

steps.action: EV driver presents the same cached IdTag at another connector
SUT uses cached authorization (no Authorize request sent to CSMS)
SUT starts transaction using the cached IdTag
CSMS accepts the transaction

fields.description:
Remote Start - Cached Id

Suite: Cache
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: Populate the authorization cache on SUT (prior successful auth)
CSMS sends RemoteStartTransaction with a cached IdTag
steps.result: Remote start request sent with cached IdTag

steps.action: SUT uses cached authorization (no Authorize to CSMS)
SUT locks connector and starts transaction
CSMS accepts

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_008_1_CS — Local Auth List - Regular Start
fields.description:
Local Auth List - Regular Start

Suite: LocalAuthList
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: CSMS sends SendLocalList with authorized IdTags
SUT confirms receipt of local list
EV driver plugs cable and presents IdTag from local list
SUT authorizes locally (no Authorize request to CSMS)
steps.result: SUT finds IdTag in local list

steps.action: SUT starts transaction using locally authorized IdTag
steps.result: Transaction started with locally authorized IdTag

steps.action: CSMS accepts and transaction proceeds

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_008_2_CS — Local Auth List - Remote Start
fields.description:
Local Auth List - Remote Start

Suite: LocalAuthList
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: CSMS sends SendLocalList with authorized IdTags
SUT confirms
CSMS sends RemoteStartTransaction with IdTag from local list
steps.result: Remote start with locally authorized IdTag

steps.action: SUT authorizes locally and locks connector
steps.result: SUT finds IdTag in local list, proceeds

steps.action: SUT starts transaction
steps.result: Transaction started via remote start with local list

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_010_CS — Remote Start - Cable Plugged First
fields.description:
Remote Start - Cable Plugged First

Suite: RemoteActions
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 8

steps.action: Check configuration: AuthorizeRemoteTxRequests
EV driver plugs cable into the connector
SUT reports Preparing status
CSMS sends RemoteStartTransaction
SUT authorizes the IdTag
CSMS authorizes
SUT locks connector and starts transaction
CSMS accepts

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_011_1_CS — Remote Start - Remote Start First
fields.description:
Remote Start - Remote Start First

Suite: RemoteActions
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: CSMS sends RemoteStartTransaction before cable is plugged
steps.result: Remote start request sent before plugin

steps.action: SUT may send Authorize or wait for cable
EV driver plugs cable into the connector
steps.result: Cable plugged in after remote start

steps.action: SUT detects plug and sets Preparing status
SUT locks connector and starts transaction
CSMS accepts

fields.description:
Remote Start - Time Out

Suite: RemoteActions
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: CSMS sends RemoteStartTransaction
EV driver does NOT plug the cable within the connection timeout
SUT aborts the pending start and returns connector to Available
steps.result: Connector returns to Available after timeout

fields.description:
Remote Stop Charging Session

Suite: RemoteActions
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: Start a regular charging session (transaction active)
CSMS sends RemoteStopTransaction
SUT stops the energy transfer and unlocks connector
CSMS confirms
SUT updates connector status to Available

fields.description:
Hard Reset Without Transaction

Suite: Resetting
No CDS required — protocol-only test. Reboot test — requires extended timeouts (max_timeout_period=600, long_operation_timeout=650).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 9

steps.action: Set connector to Inoperative via ChangeAvailability
SUT confirms the availability change
SUT reports Inoperative status
CSMS sends Reset(Hard)
SUT acknowledges reset
SUT reboots
SUT reconnects and sends BootNotification
CSMS accepts boot
SUT reports connector status

fields.description:
Soft Reset Without Transaction

Suite: Resetting
No CDS required — protocol-only test. Reboot test — requires extended timeouts (max_timeout_period=600, long_operation_timeout=650).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 7

steps.action: Set connector to Inoperative
SUT confirms
SUT reports Inoperative
CSMS sends Reset(Soft)
SUT acknowledges
SUT performs soft reboot
SUT reconnects and sends BootNotification

fields.description:
Hard Reset With Transaction

Suite: Resetting
No CDS required — protocol-only test. Reboot test — requires extended timeouts (max_timeout_period=600, long_operation_timeout=650).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 7

steps.action: Start a regular charging session (transaction active)
CSMS sends Reset(Hard)
SUT acknowledges reset
SUT stops the active transaction due to reset
SUT reboots
SUT reconnects and sends BootNotification
CSMS accepts

fields.description:
Soft Reset With Transaction

Suite: Resetting
No CDS required — protocol-only test. Reboot test — requires extended timeouts (max_timeout_period=600, long_operation_timeout=650).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: Start a charging session (transaction active)
CSMS sends Reset(Soft)
SUT acknowledges
SUT stops the active transaction
SUT reboots
SUT reconnects and sends BootNotification

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_017_1_CS — Unlock - No Session (Not Fixed Cable)
fields.description:
Unlock - No Session (Not Fixed Cable)

Suite: Unlocking
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: Ensure no transaction active and cable is NOT fixed (detachable)
CSMS sends UnlockConnector
SUT unlocks the connector (mechanical lock release)
SUT responds with Unlocked status

fields.description:
Unlock - No Session (Fixed Cable)

Suite: Unlocking
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: Ensure no transaction active and cable IS fixed (permanently attached)
CSMS sends UnlockConnector
SUT responds that unlock is not supported on fixed cable

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_018_1_CS — Unlock - With Session (Not Fixed Cable)
fields.description:
Unlock - With Session (Not Fixed Cable)

Suite: Unlocking
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: Start a charging session with non-fixed cable
CSMS sends UnlockConnector
steps.result: Unlock request sent during active transaction

steps.action: SUT stops the transaction first
steps.result: Transaction stopped due to unlock command

steps.action: SUT unlocks the connector
SUT responds with Unlocked status

fields.description:
Unlock - With Session (Fixed Cable)

Suite: Unlocking
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: Start a charging session with fixed cable
CSMS sends UnlockConnector
steps.result: Unlock request sent during active transaction

steps.action: SUT responds NotSupported (fixed cable cannot unlock)

fields.description:
Retrieve Configuration

Suite: Configuration
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: CSMS sends GetConfiguration for specific key
SUT returns the requested configuration key value
CSMS sends GetConfiguration with empty key list (all keys)
SUT returns all supported configuration keys

fields.description:
Change/Set Configuration

Suite: Configuration
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: CSMS sends ChangeConfiguration to set a writable key
SUT accepts the configuration change
Verify the new value by reading it back
SUT returns the updated value

fields.description:
Start Local - Authorize Invalid

Suite: BasicActions
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: EV driver plugs cable and presents an invalid/unknown IdTag
SUT sends Authorize with the invalid IdTag
CSMS rejects the authorization
SUT informs user and does NOT start transaction
steps.result: Transaction NOT started; user notified of invalid IdTag

fields.description:
Start Remote - Authorize Invalid

Suite: BasicActions
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: CSMS sends RemoteStartTransaction with an invalid IdTag
SUT sends Authorize with the invalid IdTag
CSMS rejects authorization
SUT does NOT start transaction
steps.result: No transaction started; connector remains Available

fields.description:
Start - Lock Failure

Suite: BasicActions
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: EV driver plugs cable and presents valid IdTag
SUT sends Authorize (valid IdTag)
CSMS authorizes
SUT attempts to lock connector but lock mechanism fails
SUT reports lock failure and sets connector to Faulted
steps.result: Connector status set to Faulted with ConnectorLockFailure

fields.description:
Remote Start - Rejected

Suite: RemoteActionsNonHappy
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: Start a charging session (connector already occupied)
CSMS sends RemoteStartTransaction to the same (already occupied) connector
steps.result: Remote start request on occupied connector

steps.action: SUT rejects the remote start because connector is occupied

fields.description:
Remote Start - ConnectorId=0

Suite: RemoteActionsNonHappy
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 2

steps.action: CSMS sends RemoteStartTransaction with connectorId=0 (reserved)
SUT responds with Rejected (connectorId=0 is not valid for start)

fields.description:
Remote Stop - Rejected

Suite: RemoteActionsNonHappy
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 2

steps.action: CSMS sends RemoteStopTransaction with an unknown/non-existent transactionId
SUT rejects because transactionId does not exist

fields.description:
Unlock - Unlock Failure

Suite: UnlockingNonHappy
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: CSMS sends UnlockConnector
SUT attempts to unlock but lock mechanism fails
SUT responds with UnlockFailed status

fields.description:
Unlock - Unknown Connector

Suite: UnlockingNonHappy
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 2

steps.action: CSMS sends UnlockConnector with non-existent connectorId
SUT rejects because connectorId does not exist

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_032_1_CS — Power Failure - Stop Before Down
fields.description:
Power Failure - Stop Before Down

Suite: PowerFailure
No CDS required — protocol-only test. Reboot test — requires extended timeouts (max_timeout_period=600, long_operation_timeout=650).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: Start a charging session (transaction active)
Simulate power failure with backup power available
steps.result: SUT detects impending power loss, backup power active

steps.action: SUT stops transaction before going down (backup power allows orderly shutdown)
steps.result: Transaction stopped with reason PowerLoss before shutdown

steps.action: SUT powers off
Power restored: SUT boots and reconnects

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_032_2_CS — Power Failure - Stop After Down
fields.description:
Power Failure - Stop After Down

Suite: PowerFailure
No CDS required — protocol-only test. Reboot test — requires extended timeouts (max_timeout_period=600, long_operation_timeout=650).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: Start a charging session (transaction active)
Simulate sudden power failure WITHOUT backup power
SUT goes off without sending StopTransaction
Power restored: SUT boots and reconnects
SUT sends StopTransaction for the interrupted transaction (from non-volatile memory)
steps.result: Transaction stopped after reboot with reason PowerLoss

fields.description:
Power Failure - Unavailable Status

Suite: PowerFailure
No CDS required — protocol-only test. Reboot test — requires extended timeouts (max_timeout_period=600, long_operation_timeout=650).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: Set connector to Unavailable via ChangeAvailability
SUT confirms
SUT reports Unavailable
Simulate power cycle (power off then on)
SUT boots and sends BootNotification
Verify connector status persists as Unavailable after reboot
steps.result: Unavailable status persists across power cycle

fields.description:
Connection Loss During Transaction

Suite: OfflineBehavior
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: Start a charging session (transaction active)
Simulate network connection loss (CSMS disconnects)
SUT continues charging and queues meter values locally
steps.result: Meter values queued during offline period

steps.action: Restore network connection
SUT sends queued meter values to CSMS
steps.result: Queued meter values sent after reconnection

fields.description:
Offline Start - Valid IdTag

Suite: OfflineBehavior
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: Ensure SUT is offline (no connection to CSMS)
EV driver plugs cable and presents a valid known IdTag
SUT starts transaction locally (offline authorization)
Restore network connection
SUT sends StartTransaction to CSMS (for the offline-started transaction)
CSMS accepts the transaction

fields.description:
Offline Start - Invalid IdTag (StopOnInvalid=false)

Suite: OfflineBehavior
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: Configure StopTransactionOnInvalidId=false
Ensure SUT is offline
EV driver presents an invalid/unknown IdTag while offline
SUT starts transaction despite invalid IdTag (StopOnInvalidId=false)
steps.result: Transaction started with invalid IdTag offline

steps.action: Restore connection and SUT sends StartTransaction
steps.result: Transaction started offline with invalid IdTag reported

fields.description:
Offline Start - Invalid IdTag (StopOnInvalid=true)

Suite: OfflineBehavior
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: Configure StopTransactionOnInvalidId=true
Ensure SUT is offline
EV driver presents an invalid/unknown IdTag while offline
SUT may start transaction but will stop it when reconnecting (invalid IdTag)
Restore connection
SUT stops the transaction due to invalid IdTag (StopOnInvalidId=true)

fields.description:
Offline Stop Transaction

Suite: OfflineBehavior
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: Start a charging session (transaction active, online)
Simulate network connection loss
EV driver stops charging (unplug or local stop) while offline
SUT stops transaction locally (queues StopTransaction)
Restore network connection
SUT sends StopTransaction to CSMS
steps.result: StopTransaction sent after reconnection with reason Local

fields.description:
Offline Transaction

Suite: OfflineBehavior
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: Ensure SUT is offline
Start and stop a transaction entirely while offline
Restore network connection
SUT sends StartTransaction (offline started)
CSMS accepts
SUT sends StopTransaction (offline stopped)

fields.description:
Config Key - NotSupported

Suite: ConfigKeysNonHappy
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 2

steps.action: CSMS sends ChangeConfiguration with an unknown/unsupported key
SUT rejects with NotSupported status
steps.result: Configuration change rejected - key not supported

fields.description:
Config Key - Invalid Value

Suite: ConfigKeysNonHappy
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 2

steps.action: CSMS sends ChangeConfiguration with an invalid value (e.g. negative)
SUT rejects with Rejected status

fields.description:
Fault Behavior

Suite: FaultBehavior
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: Induce a fault condition on the SUT connector
SUT reports Faulted status
steps.result: Connector status set to Faulted with appropriate error code

steps.action: Attempt to start a transaction on the faulted connector
steps.result: Attempt to start on faulted connector

steps.action: SUT refuses to start transaction while connector is Faulted
steps.result: No transaction started on faulted connector

steps.action: CSMS sends a local auth list (version 1) to SUT

steps.action: SUT confirms

steps.action: CSMS sends SendLocalList to SUT that does not support local auth lists

steps.action: CSMS sends SendLocalList with an old/stale version number

fields.description:
Send Local List - Failed

Suite: LocalAuthList
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 2

steps.action: CSMS sends SendLocalList but SUT fails to store it

fields.description:
Send Local Authorization List

Suite: LocalAuthList
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: CSMS sends a Full update of local auth list (version 1)
steps.result: Full local list sent with version 1

steps.action: SUT accepts
CSMS sends a Differential update (version 2, adds idTag3, removes idTag1)
SUT accepts differential update
Verify version incremented
SUT returns version 2

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_044_1_CS — Firmware Update - Download and Install
fields.description:
Firmware Update - Download and Install

Suite: FirmwareManagement
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: CSMS sends UpdateFirmware with download location and install time
SUT starts downloading firmware and reports Downloading status
SUT completes download and reports Downloaded
SUT starts installing firmware and reports Installing
SUT completes installation and may reboot, then reports Installed

fields.description:
Firmware Update - Download Failed

Suite: FirmwareManagement
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: CSMS sends UpdateFirmware with invalid download location
SUT attempts to download but fails
SUT reports DownloadFailed

fields.description:
Firmware Update - Installation Failed

Suite: FirmwareManagement
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: CSMS sends UpdateFirmware with valid download location
SUT downloads firmware successfully
SUT attempts to install but installation fails
SUT reports InstallationFailed

fields.description:
Get Diagnostics

Suite: Diagnostics
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: CSMS sends GetDiagnostics with upload location
SUT starts uploading diagnostics and reports Uploading
SUT completes upload and reports Uploaded

fields.description:
Get Diagnostics - Upload Failed

No CDS required — protocol-only test.

Total Steps: 3

steps.action: CSMS sends GetDiagnostics with invalid upload location

fields.description:
Reserve Connector - Local Start

Suite: Reservation
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: CSMS sends ReserveNow to reserve a specific connector
SUT accepts reservation
SUT reports connector as Reserved
EV driver plugs cable and presents reserved IdTag
SUT authorizes (IdTag matches reservation) and starts transaction
CSMS accepts

fields.description:
Reserve Connector - Remote Start

Suite: Reservation
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: CSMS sends ReserveNow
SUT accepts
CSMS sends RemoteStartTransaction with reserved IdTag
SUT authorizes and starts transaction
steps.result: Transaction started via remote start on reserved connector

fields.description:
Reserve Connector - Expire

Suite: Reservation
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: CSMS sends ReserveNow with a short expiry time
SUT accepts and sets connector Reserved
Wait for expiry time to pass
SUT returns connector to Available after expiry
steps.result: Connector returns to Available after reservation expiry

fields.description:
Reserve Connector - Faulted

Suite: Reservation
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: Set connector to Faulted state
CSMS sends ReserveNow for the faulted connector
SUT rejects reservation with status Faulted

fields.description:
Reserve Connector - Occupied

Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: Start a transaction on a connector (Occupied)
CSMS sends ReserveNow for the occupied connector
SUT rejects reservation with status Occupied

fields.description:
Reserve Connector - Unavailable

Suite: Reservation
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: Set connector to Unavailable/Inoperative
CSMS sends ReserveNow for the unavailable connector
SUT rejects with status Unavailable

fields.description:
Reserve Connector - Rejected

Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 2

steps.action: CSMS sends ReserveNow when reservation is not supported
SUT rejects with status Rejected

fields.description:

OCPP Version: 1.6

Total Steps: 3

steps.action: CSMS sends ReserveNow with connectorId=0 (any available connector)
SUT reserves any available connector
Start a transaction on the reserved connector

fields.description:
Reserve ChargePoint - Faulted

Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

Total Steps: 3

steps.action: Set all connectors to Faulted

SUT rejects with status Faulted (no available connector)

fields.description:

steps.action: All connectors occupied with active transactions

fields.description:
Reserve ChargePoint - Unavailable

Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: Set all connectors to Unavailable

fields.description:
Reserve ChargePoint - Rejected

Suite: Reservation
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

steps.action: CSMS sends ReserveNow with connectorId=0 when not supported

Cancel Reservation - Rejected

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 2

steps.action: CSMS sends CancelReservation with unknown/non-existent reservationId

Reserved - parentIdTag Local

steps.action: CSMS sends ReserveNow with parentIdTag specified
SUT accepts

Reserved - parentIdTag Remote

steps.action: CSMS sends ReserveNow with parentIdTag
SUT accepts

SUT matches child IdTag to parentIdTag reservation and starts transaction
steps.result: Transaction started via remote start using parentIdTag reservation

fields.description:

steps.action: CSMS sends TriggerMessage for Heartbeat
SUT acknowledges and sends Heartbeat
CSMS sends TriggerMessage for StatusNotification
SUT sends StatusNotification
CSMS sends TriggerMessage for DiagnosticsStatusNotification
SUT sends DiagnosticsStatusNotification

Trigger Message - Rejected

Total Steps: 4

steps.action: CSMS sends SetChargingProfile with TxDefaultProfile
SUT accepts the charging profile
CSMS requests composite schedule for a connector
SUT returns the composite schedule based on TxDefaultProfile

fields.description:
Smart Charging - TxProfile

Suite: SmartCharging
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: Start a charging session (transaction active)
CSMS sends SetChargingProfile with TxProfile for the active transaction
SUT accepts
CSMS requests composite schedule
SUT returns composite schedule reflecting TxProfile

fields.description:
Smart Charging - No Transaction

Suite: SmartCharging
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: Ensure no transaction is active
CSMS sends SetChargingProfile with TxProfile purpose (but no transaction)
SUT rejects because no transaction exists for TxProfile

fields.description:
Smart Charging - Wrong TransactionId

Suite: SmartCharging
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: Start a transaction
CSMS sends SetChargingProfile with wrong/non-existent transactionId
SUT rejects because transactionId does not match

fields.description:

Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

SUT authorizes and starts transaction with the provided profile
CSMS requests composite schedule to verify profile applied
SUT returns composite schedule reflecting the TxProfile
steps.result: Composite schedule matches TxProfile from remote start

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_060_CS — Remote Start with ChargingProfile - Rejected
fields.description:
Remote Start with ChargingProfile - Rejected

Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 2

steps.action: CSMS sends RemoteStartTransaction with wrong ChargingProfilePurpose (e.g. TxDefaultProfile instead of TxProfile)
steps.result: Remote start with wrong profile purpose

steps.action: SUT rejects the remote start because TxDefaultProfile not allowed in RemoteStart

fields.description:
Clear Cache - Local

Suite: Cache
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: Populate the authorization cache with an authorized IdTag
CSMS sends ClearCache request
SUT clears its authorization cache
EV driver presents the previously cached IdTag (local start)
SUT does NOT find IdTag in cache, sends Authorize to CSMS
steps.result: Authorize sent because cache was cleared

steps.action: CSMS authorizes

fields.description:
Clear Cache - Remote

Suite: Cache
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: Populate the authorization cache with an authorized IdTag
CSMS sends ClearCache
SUT clears cache
CSMS sends RemoteStartTransaction with the previously cached IdTag
steps.result: Remote start with previously cached IdTag

steps.action: SUT does NOT find IdTag in cache, sends Authorize
steps.result: Authorize sent because cache was cleared

steps.action: CSMS authorizes and transaction proceeds

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_062_CS — Data Transfer to Charge Point
fields.description:
Data Transfer to Charge Point

Suite: DataTransfer
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 2

steps.action: CSMS sends DataTransfer with an unknown vendorId
steps.result: Data transfer request with unknown vendor

steps.action: SUT responds with UnknownVendorId or Rejected

fields.description:
Get Composite Schedule

Suite: SmartCharging
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: Set up multiple charging profiles at different stack levels
steps.result: Multiple profiles active at different stack levels

steps.action: CSMS sends GetCompositeSchedule for a connector
SUT returns the composite schedule combining all profiles
steps.result: Composite schedule reflects the merged profiles (stacked)

fields.description:
Clear Charging Profile

Suite: SmartCharging
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 7

steps.action: CSMS sends SetChargingProfile with TxDefaultProfile
SUT accepts
CSMS sends ClearChargingProfile (clear by id)
SUT clears the profile
Verify profile cleared: GetCompositeSchedule should show no schedule
Repeat with ClearChargingProfile(chargingProfilePurpose=TxDefault, stackLevel=1)
steps.result: Clear profile by purpose and stack level

steps.action: SUT clears and confirms

fields.description:
Stop transaction - Same idTag

Suite: StopSession
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: Start a charging session with a specific idTag
EV driver presents the SAME idTag to stop the transaction
SUT sends Authorize with the same idTag
CSMS authorizes
SUT stops the transaction because idTag matches
CSMS confirms

fields.description:
Stop transaction - Same ParentIdTag

Suite: StopSession
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: Start a charging session with idTag that has a parentIdTag
EV driver presents a DIFFERENT idTag (idTag2) that shares the same parentIdTag
steps.result: Different idTag with same parentIdTag presented

steps.action: SUT sends Authorize with idTag2
CSMS authorizes (parentIdTag links to active transaction)
SUT stops the transaction because parentIdTag matches
steps.result: Transaction stopped using different idTag with same parentIdTag

fields.description:
Sampled Meter Values

Suite: MeterValues
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: Configure MeterValueSampleInterval (e.g. 60s)
Start a charging session
SUT sends sampled meter values at configured interval during charging
Verify meter values contain valid measurands (energy, power, etc.)
steps.result: Meter values contain valid measurands with correct units and values

fields.description:
Clock-aligned Meter Values

Suite: MeterValues
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: Configure ClockAlignedDataInterval (e.g. 900s)
Start a charging session
SUT sends clock-aligned meter values at each 15-min boundary
steps.result: Clock-aligned meter values received at expected intervals

steps.action: Verify meter values align to clock boundaries
steps.result: Timestamps are aligned to 15-min clock boundaries

fields.description:
Stacking Charging Profiles

Suite: SmartCharging
Requires CDS EV simulator (Keysight).

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: CSMS sends first TxDefaultProfile at stackLevel=1
SUT accepts
CSMS sends second TxDefaultProfile at stackLevel=2
SUT accepts
CSMS requests composite schedule
steps.result: Get composite schedule with stacked profiles

steps.action: SUT returns composite schedule applying both profiles (stackLevel 2 overrides stackLevel 1)
steps.result: Composite schedule reflects stacking: higher stackLevel takes precedence

fields.description:

Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: CSMS sends ChangeConfiguration to update AuthorizationKey
SUT accepts the new password
CSMS disconnects SUT
SUT reconnects using HTTP Basic Authentication with the new password
steps.result: SUT reconnects successfully with new password

fields.description:
Update ChargePoint Certificate

No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 4

steps.action: CSMS sends ExtendedTriggerMessage to trigger certificate signing
SUT sends SignCertificate request
CSMS sends CertificateSigned with the signed certificate
SUT accepts and installs the certificate

Install ManufacturerRootCertificate

No CDS required — protocol-only test.

Role: Charging Station (CS)

steps.action: CSMS sends InstallCertificate for ManufacturerRootCertificate
SUT installs the certificate

SUT returns list including the newly installed certificate

fields.description:
Install CentralSystemRootCertificate

No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: CSMS sends InstallCertificate for CentralSystemRootCertificate
SUT installs the certificate

Delete Certificate

No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: CSMS sends GetInstalledCertificateIds to list all certs
SUT returns list of installed certificate hashes
CSMS sends DeleteCertificate with a certificate hash
SUT deletes the certificate
Verify deletion: GetInstalledCertificateIds no longer shows the deleted cert
steps.result: Deleted certificate no longer in list

fields.description:
Invalid ChargePointCertificate

Suite: Security
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 5

steps.action: CSMS sends ExtendedTriggerMessage(SignChargePointCertificate)
SUT sends SignCertificate with CSR
CSMS sends CertificateSigned with an INVALID certificate
SUT rejects the invalid certificate
SUT may send SecurityEventNotification for the certificate failure

fields.description:
Invalid CentralSystemCertificate

No CDS required — protocol-only test.

Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 2

steps.action: SUT connects to CSMS but detects an invalid server certificate
SUT sends SecurityEventNotification
steps.result: Security event for invalid CSMS cert

fields.description:
Get Security Log

Suite: Security
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 3

steps.action: CSMS sends GetLog for SecurityLog
SUT starts uploading security log
SUT completes log upload

fields.description:
Secure Firmware Update

Suite: Security
No CDS required — protocol-only test.

OCPP Version: 1.6
Role: Charging Station (CS)
Total Steps: 6

steps.action: CSMS sends SignedUpdateFirmware with valid signature
SUT validates signature and starts download
SUT sends SignedFirmwareStatusNotification as download progresses
SUT completes download
SUT installs firmware
SUT completes installation

fields.summary: [OCPP 1.6] TC_081_CS — Secure Firmware Update - Invalid Sig
fields.description:

steps.action: Verify composite schedule reflects the new profile
